description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, rectangular earcup design and a thick, padded headband. The earcups are large and appear to be made of a matte black plastic with visible wear or texture on the outer surfaces. The headband is covered in a soft, leather-like material, providing comfort for extended use. Hinges and adjustment sliders are visible, allowing the headphones to fit various head sizes. Small metallic accents and possible control buttons are present near the earcups, suggesting some interactive features. The overall build is solid and utilitarian, suitable for both casual and professional urban environments.
description: A pair of large, rectangular over-ear headphones with a padded headband and matte black earcups, featuring metallic accents and visible adjustment mechanisms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the padded headband and the flat, rectangular faces of the earcups.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the earcups, the hinge mechanism, and the metallic accents near the earcup joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back surfaces of both earcups and the curvature of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side's hinge and adjustment features.
